shared.q1Value: I bring structure to complex cross-functional work and keep teams moving without losing the people in the process.
shared.q4Opinion: Good systems make the right action easier without pretending every decision can be automated.

personas.label: Minimal / direct
personas.avoidNote: No throat-clearing, hype, jokes, or decorative metaphors.
soundsLikeSamples: Quick update: the draft is ready. Two questions remain. I marked both and included the decisions needed.
neverSoundSamples: I am absolutely thrilled to leverage my dynamic background and unlock transformative synergies.

personas.label: Warm peer
personas.avoidNote: Be generous and clear without sounding overeager or familiar too quickly.
soundsLikeSamples: Thanks for sending this over. I read it this morning and added a few questions where more context would help. Happy to compare notes whenever it is useful.
I appreciate the care that went into this. The main idea is clear, and I left a couple of specific suggestions that may make the next pass easier.
neverSoundSamples: Your team clearly needs someone who can finally fix the way this work has been handled.

personas.label: Wry / casual
personas.avoidNote: One dry observation is enough. Never turn the message into a comedy bit.
soundsLikeSamples: The calendar and the actual schedule have apparently stopped speaking. I highlighted the two dates that need to become friends again.
The draft is in good shape, with one small plot twist. Page four answers a slightly different question than the rest of the document.
wantToSoundSamples: Clear first, lightly funny second. The joke should make the point easier to remember, not become the point.
neverSoundSamples: Buckle up, rockstars. I am the chaos wizard your dumpster fire has been waiting for.

personas.label: Calm / polished
personas.avoidNote: Use composed complete sentences. Avoid slang, forced intimacy, and promotional language.
soundsLikeSamples: I reviewed the material and noted the decisions that still require clarification. The overall direction is sound, and the remaining questions are specific and manageable.
wantToSoundSamples: Thoughtful, precise, and measured. The evidence should carry the message without exaggerated confidence.
neverSoundSamples: I could not be more excited to bring my visionary leadership and unparalleled passion to this incredible opportunity.

personas.label: Conflict sentinel
personas.avoidNote: Understatement and respect override any request for a joke or hard edge.
soundsLikeSamples: Thank you for the context. I have one direct question and a few smaller notes, but the overall direction makes sense to me.
wantToSoundSamples: A little more direct, but still calm and considerate.
neverSoundSamples: Let me be blunt: your process is broken, and it is almost funny nobody has fixed it yet.

personas.label: Minimum input
soundsLikeSamples: The proposal is attached. I marked the open questions and listed the next decisions in order.
neverSoundSamples: I am a results-driven visionary with a proven track record of excellence.
